permits.description: 1) Pour "Rat Slab"(Thin) concrete in basement to make current dirt floor rat proof and sanitary for storage (non-habitable basement).  2) Reinforce exisitng "tree posts" supporting basement beams with proper lally columns with footings.  3) Also, replace current MDF separation wall (between attached houses, with fire-code X sheetrock (1 hr); currently perforated MDF (cardboard).  4) Install basement French drain to reduce water infiltration

llm_assessment.reasoning: The permit focuses on essential basement maintenance and structural stabilization by an owner-occupant rather than the high-end kitchen or bathroom renovations typical of a property being prepared for sale.
